_comment: Verified data: Robert Niebrugge & Sons Plumbing (legal name includes 'Electric Inc' -- multi-trade plumbing + electric), President Don Niebrugge (son of founder Robert), address 100 W Elm St Dieterich IL, phone (217) 925-5223. Founding year discrepancy across sources: one summary cites 1961 (likely family business origin), another cites 1974 (likely LLC incorporation for the '& Sons' entity). Using 1974 conservatively. Family-owned confirmed via '& Sons' naming + Catholic Business Directory 'Verified Catholic-Owned' designation. No emergency service confirmed. Hours Tue-Fri 9-6, closed Mondays and weekends. No Facebook page surfaced via WebSearch -- outreach defaults to phone or postcard (same channel constraint as Drees).
